fixtures.reason: GitHub issue mirror cannot replace confirmed Spec authority.
Provider transcript is an execution record, not project truth.
Pull request proves review surface only; evidence and decision are still required.
Release note is public delivery text, not completion authority.
Projection is read-only and cannot write authority.
Missing product mapping is visible as invalid/deferred, not silently accepted.
Audit is optional sidecar and must not block the default Done path.
